content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule, I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom C:10 (carbon with index 10). Looking at the image, atom C:10 is connected to three other atoms via covalent bonds:

1. C:7 (carbon with index 7) - to the left
2. H:33 (hydrogen with index 33) - above
3. C:11 (carbon with index 11) - to the right

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 2129, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_2129.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 10 (C) are:
- Atom 7 (C)
- Atom 33 (H)
- Atom 11 (C)

Geomconf_index: 2129

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 10, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
